security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Adaptive offline-first learning, algebra to astrophysics.
bundle.longDescription: Etta is an adaptive, gamified, offline-first learning app that takes an adult learner from foundational algebra to university-level astrophysics.
